guardrail_rules: Stage2 requires archetype-specific non-price bridge; MFE alone is not enough.
If bridge is missing or stale and MAE_90D <= -20% or MAE_180D <= -25% or post-peak drawdown <= -35%, route to local 4B-watch.
If MFE_180D >= 20% and MAE_180D > -10% in a positive/lifecycle row, protect from overblocking after source repair.
If MAE_180D > -20% in a bounded/RiskWatch row and no non-price break exists, do not force local 4B.

Hard 4C is never price-only; require non-price thesis break such as default, cancellation, regulatory reversal, financing, margin, credit, solvency, contract churn, user churn, adoption collapse, tender failure, policy reversal or control evidence.
Share-count, status, name/status, event-mechanics, reserve/accounting, post-corporate-action and extended-status flags block runtime ingestion until validated.
